blocks.body: Wh-questions (special questions) are questions that begin with question words (who, what, where, when, why, how) and require specific information in the answer, not just "yes" or "no".

{ "title": "11. Short synopsis", "items": [ "Wh-questions are special questions that require a specific answer (not Yes/No).", "Who (who, whom) - about people. As a subject: Who lives here? As an appendix: Who do you see?", "What (what) — about things and information. What do you want? What time is it?", "Where (where, where) - about the place. Where do you live? Where are you going?", "When (when) — about time. When did it happen? When are you leaving?", "Why (why) - about the reason. Why are you sad? → answer with because.", "How (as) — about the method. How do you do it? How old/much/many/far?", "Structure: Wh-word + Auxiliary + Subject + Verb (except subject questions).", "Subject questions: Wh-word + Verb (without do/does/did) — Who lives here?" ] }
